历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 37247, 27520, 25572, 28554, and 36341, showing a fluctuating trend of "first rise, then fall, then rise." The 2021 baseline was about 37247, with a significant forward shift to 25572 in 2022–2023, a slight backward shift to 28554 in 2024, and a large backward shift to 36341 in 2025, a cumulative backward shift of about 10769 compared to 2023. The 2025 baseline is about 36341; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Yunnan Province was 50 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 77 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 77, unchanged from 2025, with expansion paused. The unchanged plan means zero supply-demand elasticity, but changes in the number of examinees become the main competitive variable.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in recent years is about 173–198, and it did not enter the top 200 in 2026, showing a slight downward trend. As a comprehensive university in the west, its overall level is in the middle to lower segment among 211 universities; the university has no records in any year in the reputation file, indicating no major positive or negative public opinion events in recent years, with a stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 106th overall, rated as "average," with a comprehensive popularity of about 49565, indicating low attention on short video platforms and no obvious signal of application heat. There is also no information about the university in historical submission anomaly records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no A-/A/A+ level disciplines, with relatively weak academic strength. The university is characterized by medicine, agriculture and forestry, and engineering, with clinical medicine and grass science as traditional advantageous directions, but they have not entered the A-level rating, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In terms of 2026 major popularity, computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, etc., are highly recommended majors, clinical medicine is a recommended major; while civil engineering, biology, chemistry, environment, and materials are clearly discouraged majors. Among the majors Qinghai University recruits in Yunnan, popular majors such as clinical medicine, electrical engineering and automation, and computer science and technology account for a certain proportion, but there are also many unpopular majors like agriculture and forestry, and environment, making the overall major structure moderately attractive to candidates. The number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 229,000, a significant increase of about 32.1% from 173,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, far from Yunnan Province, and the regional preference of southwestern candidates for northwestern universities is generally average.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 36341, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 32% in the number of Physics Category examinees in the province leading to intensified competition, a slight decline in university ranking, and stable reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 37141, with a range of 36641–37641.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 36641–37641, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 36000), focus on stretching for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation; for rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 37500), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 majors as a safety net to avoid slipping. Qinghai University's overall discipline evaluation strength is average, so it is recommended to prioritize majors with good employment prospects such as medicine, electrical, and computer science.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来全国医学类专业报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心医学专业竞争尤为激烈。青海大学地处西北，地域吸引力相对东部院校偏弱，但其211身份和双一流标签对 云南省考生仍具较强吸引力。云南省内医学类招生规模有限，青海大学医学类在滇计划常年维持在5—11人之间，2026年进一步缩减至9人，供需矛盾进一步加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Qinghai University's medical category in Yunnan Province from 2021 to 2025 were 36701, 25511, 25572, 27168, and 36341 respectively, showing a volatile pattern of first rising, then falling, and then sharply dropping. In 2021, the plan was 10 students; after reducing to 5 in 2022, the ranking rose significantly (easier to enter); in 2023, it expanded to 7 with rankings basically unchanged; in 2024, it expanded to 11 with rankings slightly dropping to 27168; in 2025, the plan adjusted back to 10 but rankings plummeted to 36341 (harder to enter), reflecting a sharp rise in medical application popularity. In 2026, the plan further reduces to 9 students (a 10% reduction). According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the reduction will alleviate some competitive pressure, causing the baseline ranking to rebound compared to 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Qinghai University is a key construction university under Project 211 and has been selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Xining City, Qinghai Province. As the only 211 university in Qinghai Province, its medical majors have a certain influence in the Northwest region, with majors such as Clinical Medicine having a long history of operation, and the overall school level is leading among provincial universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has continued to rise, with core medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology facing particularly intense competition. Qinghai University is located in the Northwest, with relatively weaker regional appeal compared to eastern institutions, but its 211 status and Double First-Class label still have strong attraction for Yunnan Province candidates. The enrollment scale for medical majors in Yunnan Province is limited, and Qinghai University's medical enrollment plan in Yunnan has remained between 5 and 11 students in recent years, further reducing to 9 in 2026, exacerbating the supply-demand contradiction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of recent ranking trends, the minimum admission ranking for Qinghai University's medical category in Yunnan Province in 2026 is predicted to be 34661, rebounding (easier to enter) compared to 2025 (36341), but still within a historically high range. The predicted admission range is 34161 to 35161. Candidates are advised to position themselves reasonably based on their own rankings.
